changes.scalar_boundary: one persistent tracker-owned bounded worker with a one-item queue and per-run circuit breaker
changes.quota_boundary: tracker-lifetime candidate reservations, maximum observed used bytes, and minimum observed limit bytes
changes.watch_boundary: watch state registered before installation with global cleanup after partial or model-specific teardown failure

validation.relevant_command: uv run pytest -q tests/test_wandb_tracking.py tests/test_config_profiles.py tests/test_trainer.py tests/test_reproducibility.py tests/test_verify_wb001_dgx.py
validation.static_checks: repository Ruff pass; four changed Python files formatted; uv lock check, runner bash syntax, JSON parse, and git diff check pass
